title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vascon Engineers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vascon Engineers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Vascon Engineers, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!
